value.rationale: The claim concerns a specific "Codex guardrails" safety post (dated May 8, 2026) describing sandboxing, approvals, network policy, credentials, and telemetry as an enterprise control system. The fetched page is the Codex product landing/navigation page. While the navigation lists related items (e.g., "Sandboxing," "Permissions," "Agent approvals & security," "Cyber Safety," "Governance," and a separate "Guardrails" item under the Agents SDK), the page body does not describe a "Codex guardrails" safety post or the asserted control-system framing, nor does it mention a May 8, 2026 post. The page content is generic Codex marketing copy. There is no verbatim text on the page substantiating the specific claimed offering/safety post.
